posts.title: NeuroDream
posts.excerpt:
Vision board maker
NeuroDream is a modern vision board and manifestation app designed to help you organize your dreams, strengthen your mindset, and stay connected to your goals every day.

It combines classic visualization practices with neuroscience-inspired exercises to create a more active, structured, and motivating way to work toward the life you want.
posts.author: The Cheervinsky Studio
posts.body:
NeuroDream is a modern vision board and manifestation app designed to help you organize your dreams, strengthen your mindset, and stay connected to your goals every day.

It combines classic visualization practices with neuroscience-inspired exercises to create a more active, structured, and motivating way to work toward the life you want.

### With NeuroDream, you can:

- create dream lists and organize your goals
- add personal affirmations to each dream
- transform negative thoughts into positive affirmations
- mark goals as completed
- assign categories to your dreams
- use a Feng Shui-inspired board with life areas and categories
- create custom collage boards
- personalize your boards the way you want
- archive and share your boards
- add links to your dreams for extra inspiration and motivation
- set your dream boards as wallpapers
- use widgets to keep your goals visible every day
- set reminders for meditation and focus
- explore neuroplasticity-inspired exercises
- practice creative brain-training activities, including using your non-dominant hand

### **NeuroDream is made for people who want more than a traditional vision board. It gives you a personal space where dreams, affirmations, visualization, and daily practice come together in one app.
**

Whether your goals are about love, career, money, health, creativity, or personal growth, NeuroDream helps you keep them clear, visual, and close to your daily life.

Use dream boards, affirmations, wallpapers, links, and widgets to build a stronger connection to your future. Revisit your goals, stay inspired, and create a daily routine that supports your mindset and motivation.

NeuroDream is part of a wider ecosystem that also includes tools focused on calm, concentration, and brain training, helping you build a more intentional and focused lifestyle.

*Create your future with intention, clarity, and daily action.*

posts.title: Screen Time Monitor
posts.excerpt: Screen Time Monitor helps you understand how you spend time on your phone - by app and by day. View clear usage stats and graphs, then set notifications to stay on track.
posts.author: The Cheervinsky Studio
posts.body:
### **What you can do:**

- Daily screen time overview — see total device usage for today and recent days
- Per-app usage details — find the apps that take the most time
- Usage graphs — simple charts to spot patterns quickly
- Limit notifications — set a daily time limit for any app and get notified when you exceed it
- Lightweight and focused — no extra features, just monitoring and alerts

### **How it works**

- Open the app to see today’s screen time and top apps.
- Tap an app to view its daily usage.
- Set a limit (for example, 30 min/day).
- Get a notification when the limit is exceeded.


**Mood Tracker helps you understand how your apps affect your emotional state.
With Mood Tracker, you can select specific apps to track and see how they influence your mood over time. Simply mark the apps you want to monitor, and every time you open one of them, you will be asked to rate how you feel. When you leave the app, you’ll be prompted again.**

This creates a clear before-and-after picture of how each app impacts your mood — positively or negatively.

## **How it works:**
- Choose which apps you want to track using a simple checkbox list
- Get a short mood check-in when you open a tracked app
- Get another mood check-in when you leave it
- Review insights showing which apps improve your mood and which drain it

**By connecting screen time with emotional awareness, Mood Tracker helps you make healthier digital choices and regain control over how apps affect your well-being.**

*Made by Calmloop.*

posts.title: Reverse Audio Game
posts.excerpt: Turn speech into a hilarious challenge. Reverse Audio Game lets you flip any phrase backwards, practice saying the backward version, then play your attempt in the normal direction to hear how close you are to the original.
posts.author: The Cheervinsky Studio
posts.body:
### **How it works:**
🎤 Record a word or phrase
🔄 Play it backwards
🗣️ Practice & record yourself pronouncing the backward audio
↩️ Play your attempt in normal mode and compare with the original
💾 Save (download) or 📤 share your best takes

### **Why you’ll love it:**
⚡ Instant reverse & re-reverse playback
😂 Super simple flow for quick laughs with friends
💾 Save (download) & 📤 share recordings
✈️ Works offline — perfect for trips & parties

### **Privacy & permissions:**
🎙️ Microphone access for recording only
🔐 Recordings stay on your device unless you share them

*Ready to flip your voice and test your mimic skills? 🚀 Hit Record!*

posts.title: almloop
posts.excerpt: Calmloop is an all-in-one mental wellness app — now with a powerful new 📔 Diary feature, Box Breathing, Zen Mode, expanded EMDR-style relaxation tools, and the Memory Tiles Brain Game to sharpen focus and train your mind.
posts.author: The Cheervinsky Studio
posts.body:
Great for adults, kids, and anyone looking to stay mentally sharp.

### **🧘 ZEN MODE: SOUND + CALMING VISUALS**

Zen Mode adds a soothing visual companion to your soundscapes:
🌊 Choose Line or Blob visuals that gently move with the audio
🎧 A soft focus anchor for relaxation, meditation, or deep work
🧠 Helps you settle attention and stay present while you listen

###  **🌬️ BOX BREATHING FOR CALM & RESET**

A simple guided breathing tool to help you slow down and regain control:
🟦 Breathe in, hold, out, hold — each for the same count
⏱️ Choose your pace (beginner-friendly to advanced)
⚡ Great before meetings, during anxiety, or anytime you need a reset

{{gallery:data%2Fmedia%2Fcalm2-moh1cno0-ht61n.png,data%2Fmedia%2Fcalm4-moh1cnnc-3x698.jpg|size=full|align=center|wrap=false|columns=2}}

### **🌀 EMDR-STYLE RELAXATION TOOLS FOR STRESS SUPPORT**

Calmloop includes EMDR-inspired visual tools designed to support relaxation and emotional regulation:
👁️ Follow the moving ball to calm and refocus
🧩 Multiple motion modes and patterns (choose what feels best)
🛠️ Customize speed and direction to match your comfort

Note: Calmloop provides self-care tools and does not replace professional therapy.

### **🎧 SOUND THERAPY FOR FOCUS, RELAXATION & REST**

Listen to soothing and effective audio soundscapes:
🔊 Noise Therapy — pink, red, and white noise
🌧️ Nature & Ambience — rain, wind, crackling fire
🐾 ASMR — purring cats, soft tapping, cozy sounds
🎞️ Nostalgia Sounds — old film projectors, vinyl scratches
🎼 Classical & meditation tracks — for focus and calm

### **📝 PERSONAL DIARY & MOOD TRACKER**

Write daily reflections, track your mood, and notice emotional patterns over time:
✨ Express thoughts, gratitude, or vent emotions freely
😊 Track your mood with simple icons
📈 Review trends in the Stats screen
🔔 Set journaling reminders
🔒 Private by design — your notes stay on your device
📁 Export your entries anytime

{{gallery:data%2Fmedia%2Fcalm1-moh52mok-iparp.png,data%2Fmedia%2Fcalm5-moh52mp1-zbajy.png,data%2Fmedia%2Fcalm6-moh52mph-qmvpd.png,data%2Fmedia%2Fcalm7-moh52mpu-m59vm.png|size=full|align=center|wrap=false|columns=2}}

### **🌟 WHY CHOOSE CALMLOOP?**

📚 Wellness tools built for everyday use
🔐 Private & offline-first — your data stays on your device
🧩 Simple, beautiful design you’ll actually use daily
🌿 Flexible features for calm, focus, and emotional growth

*👉 Download Calmloop and take a small daily step toward clarity, steadiness, and inner calm.*
